# anybuddy

> Real-time, location-based social app for spontaneous local hangouts. Discover plans near you and join in one tap.

anybuddy helps people meet up nearby for coffee, sports, walks, and other activities. The app is mobile-first and centers on a live feed of plans, a map view, and an "I'm Free Now" mode.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing and entry point for the anybuddy app.

## Optional

- [Onboarding](/onboarding): Intro flow for new users.
